YieldMax™ Introduces Option Income Strategy ETF on Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD)

holdings.infoBox: HOOY is an equity ETF with a total of 19 individual holdings.

overview.description: The YieldMax HOOD Option Income Strategy ETF (HOOY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund seeks to provide current income and capped gains on the Robinhood stock (HOOD) through a synthetic covered call strategy, collateralized by cash and US Treasurys. The actively managed fund uses both standardized exchange-traded and FLEX options. HOOY was launched on May 7, 2025 and is issued by YieldMax.
